sql_array: CREATE TABLE moods (id INT PRIMARY KEY, mood VARCHAR(20) CHECK (mood IN ('happy', 'sad', 'angry')));
CREATE TABLE mood_scores (mood_id INT, score FLOAT, FOREIGN KEY (mood_id) REFERENCES moods(id));
SELECT enum_code(mood) + COALESCE(SUM(score), 0) AS total_score FROM moods LEFT JOIN mood_scores ON mood_scores.mood_id = moods.id GROUP BY mood;
SELECT mood, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(enum_code(mood) + COALESCE(score, 0)) AS avg_score FROM moods LEFT JOIN mood_scores ON mood_scores.mood_id = moods.id GROUP BY mood HAVING avg_score > 10;
WITH ranked_scores AS (SELECT mood, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mood ORDER BY score DESC) AS rank FROM mood_scores) SELECT mood, score FROM ranked_scores WHERE rank = 1;
SELECT m.mood, (enum_code(m.mood) + 5) AS coded_value FROM moods m WHERE coded_value BETWEEN 2 AND 30;
SELECT mood, enum_code(mood) + 1 AS adjusted_value FROM moods WHERE mood IN (SELECT mood FROM moods WHERE id < 3);
SELECT mood, COUNT(*) + enum_code(mood) AS computed_value FROM moods GROUP BY mood HAVING computed_value IS NOT NULL;
